barbarians-white-raven-tavern: 1x during your turn: Pay 1 gold and roll the dice. On 1-2: gain nothing. On 3-5: gain 1 resource. On 6: gain 2 resources.
barbarians-border-fortress: Place adjacent to a hills region where at least 1 brick is stored. Pay this brick. For 1 ore + 1 wool, rotate the Border Fortress to the next level.
barbarians-triumph-card: Place adjacent to any region of your choice. If you win a Barbarian Attack, instead of taking 2 resources, rotate the Triumph Card to the next level. Requires: City.
barbarians-barbarian-stronghold: Place on a free road adjacent to one of your opponent's cities. For your opponent, the barbarian strength increases by 1. Removal: Opponent's Triumph Card shows 3 victory points.
barbarians-arad-the-strategist: When a Barbarian Attack occurs, each hero in the settlement/city where Arnd is placed counts as 2 units—except for Arnd himself.
barbarians-baroc-the-barbarian: After a Brigand Attack, gain 1 ore. If there is a Barbarian Stronghold in your opponent's principality, gain 2 ore instead.
barbarians-siward-the-scout: 1x during your turn: View the top 3 cards of the event stack or any draw stack for free, or pay 1 gold to view your opponent's hand.
barbarians-wolfgang-the-street-performer: Celebration: Add 1 resource to each region adjacent to Wolfgang. If you gain resources, your opponent may place Wolfgang in their principality by paying 2 gold.
barbarians-caravel: Each ship in the settlement/city where the Caravel is placed counts double in case of a Barbarian Attack—except for the Caravel itself. Requires: City.
barbarians-marie-the-shieldmaiden: During one of your following turns, demand that your opponent choose 2 heroes that can be placed on Marie's building site. Place 1 of them on Marie's site. Place Marie on the discard pile.
barbarians-secret-brotherhood: (1) If you lose against the barbarians, pay only 1 resource. (2) 1x during your turn: If you discard an unplayed unit or action card, gain any 1 resource of your choice.
barbarians-bailwick: 1x during your turn: Draw the top card from a draw stack (from your own draw stack).
barbarians-castle: For calculating your strength in a Barbarian Attack, each strength point of your Border Fortress counts as 1 additional unit.
barbarians-arsenal: In case of a Brigand Attack, resources in regions adjacent to the Arsenal are neither counted nor stolen.
barbarians-siegfried-vanquisher-of-the-b: Take 1 or 2 resources of your choice or rotate your Triumph Card to the next level. Requires: Castle and at least 2 heroes.
barbarians-alliance-against-the-barbaria: Each player with at least 1 unit takes any 1 resource of choice. The player with the most units takes up to 1 additional resource. Requires: Triumph Card (≥1 victory point) + ≥1 unit.
barbarians-castellan: The two regions adjacent to your Castle each receive 1 resource—if storage space is available. Requires: Castle.
barbarians-relocation: Swap 2 of your own regions or 2 of your own expansion cards. Resource count and card placement must remain unchanged and compliant with rules.
barbarians-contest-of-the-heroes: Name 1 of your heroes and 1 opponent hero (if they have one). Each rolls the die and adds strength points. Tie: roll again. Winner gains 1 resource and may take 1 more from loser.
barbarians-barbarian-attack: Player with fewer units than city/metropolis/expansion victory points discards 2 resources. Player with more units + ≥1 city gains 2 resources. Card then goes under top 4 cards of event stack.
barbarians-retreat-of-the-barbarians: Player with ≥1 unit chooses 1 card from 1 draw stack. Player with ≥1 unit + strength advantage chooses up to 2 cards from 1 draw stack.
explorers-shipwreck: Discovery: You receive any 1 resource of your choice. Missions to the Shipwreck are not possible.
explorers-island-of-the-bards: Discovery: Your opponent shows you their hand of cards; you may draw 1 action card or unit. Mission: Pay 2 grain to rotate to next higher level.
explorers-island-of-the-merchants: Discovery: Trade any 1 resource of your choice for any 2 other resources of your choice. Mission: Pay 2 wool to rotate to next higher level.
explorers-islands-of-the-scholars: Discovery: Choose up to 2 cards from any 1 draw stack of your choice and draw them. Mission: Pay 2 lumber to rotate to next higher level.
explorers-zheng-he: Discovery/Mission: Pay 1 gold or fight. Fight: Roll production die and add cannons. Victory: Rotate to next higher level and take bounty. Defeat: Lose ship. Tie: Roll again.
explorers-cinmarone: Discovery/Mission: Pay 1 gold or fight. Fight: Roll production die and add cannons. Victory: Rotate to next higher level and take bounty. Defeat: Lose ship. Tie: Roll again.
explorers-jean: Discovery/Mission: Pay 2 resources or fight. Fight: Roll production die and add cannons. Victory: Rotate to next higher level and take bounty. Defeat: Lose ship. Tie: Roll again.
explorers-island-of-the-forgotten-tribe: Discovery: Return ship to Explorer Harbor; carry out 1 additional mission. Mission: Roll production die—1: Reef (lose ship); 2-4: Event (roll event die); 5-6: Treasure (rotate to next higher level).
explorers-explorer-harbor: Build explorer ships (1 lumber + 1 wool; stand ship upright). You may make only 1 discovery per turn.
explorers-explorer-metropolis: Place on city adjacent to Explorer Harbor. Worth 4 victory points total. Requires: 6+ discovered sea cards or 2+ level 3 islands.
explorers-armory: Gives 1 strength point and 1 cannon point.
explorers-sailmakers-shop: Gives 1 commerce point and 1 sail point.
explorers-landing-stage: 1x per turn on mission to Island of Bards, Scholars, or Merchants: Replace 1 required resource with 1 gold.
explorers-shipyard: 1x per turn: Trade any 1 resource for 1 lumber or 1 wool.
explorers-astronomer: 1x per turn: If you have fewer sea cards discovered than opponent, pay 1 gold for second journey of exploration.
explorers-cannon-foundry: 1x per turn: If you lose against pirate, repeat die roll once.
explorers-cartographer: View up to 2 face-down sea cards and/or switch positions of any 2 sea cards in your principality. Requires: At least 1 sail point.
explorers-broadside: Opponent rotates 1 island card to next lower level or loses 1 explorer ship—you choose. Requires: At least 2 cannon points.
explorers-lars-the-naval-hero: When fighting pirate, die roll is omitted and pirate is defeated. Requires: At least 1 cannon point.
explorers-navigator: Return 1 used explorer ship to Explorer Harbor. Perform another action with this ship. Requires: 2 sail points.
explorers-ambassador: Gain advantage of discovering Island of Bards, Island of Scholars, or Island of Merchants another time. Requires: Card rotated to level 1 or higher.
explorers-friendship-between-peoples: If you receive more resources than you can store, lose excess resources.
explorers-most-successful-explorer: In case of tie, both players may draw from same stack. Player whose turn it is decides first stack; opponent chooses second.
sages-grove-of-freedom: 1x during your turn: Choose 1 card from a draw stack of your choice without changing the order. You may immediately use it; place excess under a matching stack at turn end.
sages-grove-of-fraternity: 1x during your turn: Draw up to 3 cards from any of your draw stacks. You may immediately use them; excess cards go under matching stacks at turn end. Opponent then draws 1 card from their choice of draw stacks.
sages-grove-of-justice: Before your die roll: When your opponent plays an action attack card, roll the production die. If result > 3, the card has no effect and is discarded. (Works with Brigitta without rolling.)
sages-grove-of-peace: When your opponent plays an action attack card: Roll the production die. If result > 3, the card has no effect and your opponent must discard it. (If Robert Herald is placed, result of 3 also blocks it.)
sages-grove-of-vigilance: When Trade, Celebration, or Brigand Attack is rolled: Declare the event void; instead Event Card applies. (For Brigand Attack, each player receives resources first, then draw event card.)
sages-grove-of-great-foresight: 1x during your turn: View the 3 topmost event cards. Reorder some under the stack as desired without altering the top card's position or including Yule.
sages-grove-of-courage: You may use this grove during your opponent's turn. When you would lose cards from hand or buildings to a Feud or Fraternal Feud event, those events have no effect.
sages-manifest-of-humane-conduct: Rotate to next level: Pay 1 lumber, 2 gold, 3 owls. For 2 of those owls, you may place 1 action attack card on the discard pile. Requires: City.
sages-peter-sage-of-the-forest: Place adjacent to a forest region with at least 1 lumber. Pay this lumber. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate Peter to the next higher level.
sages-michaela-sage-of-the-pasture: Place adjacent to a pasture region with at least 1 wool. Pay this wool. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate Michaela to the next higher level.
sages-barbara-sage-of-the-fields: Place adjacent to a fields region with at least 1 grain. Pay this grain. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate Barbara to the next higher level.
sages-frederich-sage-of-the-hills: Place adjacent to a hills region with at least 1 brick. Pay this brick. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate Frederich to the next higher level.
sages-piet-sage-of-the-mountains: Place adjacent to a mountains region with at least 1 ore. Pay this ore. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate Piet to the next higher level.
sages-walther-sage-of-the-gold-field: Place adjacent to a gold field region with at least 1 gold. Pay this gold. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate Walther to the next higher level. Feud/Fraternal Feud events have no effect on you.
sages-principal-sage-woman: Place adjacent to any region with at least 1 resource. Pay this resource. When the region's number is rolled during production, rotate the Principal Sage Woman to the next higher level.
sages-robert-herald-of-the-sages: When you must roll the production die to surpass a card value or your opponent's roll, you win also on a tie.
sages-cole-paladin-of-the-sages: 1x during your turn: Use the function of one of your opponent's groves by paying the number of owls indicated on it.
sages-granary: 1x during your turn: If your opponent's fields region has no grain, give them 1 grain (which they must store there). Then demand any 1 resource of a different type from them. (You can only build 1 per principality.)
sages-academy-of-sages: 1x during your turn: Pay any 1 resource of your choice and rotate any 1 sage card to the next higher level. (If both copies are built, you may provide 2 sages 1 owl each per turn instead.)
sages-courthouse: When the Trade event is rolled: You determine which resources you give to your opponent. (You can only build 1 per principality.)
sages-great-foresight: Pay 1 owl: View the event card stack and remove—without changing card order—1 event card except Yule.
sages-dispute-of-the-sages: Pay 1 owl: You and opponent roll the production die; each adds their sages' owls to their result. Winner receives any 2 resources of their choice. Tie: Both receive 1 resource. Requires: Both players have ≥1 sage.
sages-wise-compensation: Pay 3 owls: Build 1 city for free without paying resources. Requires: Fewer cities or victory points than your opponent.
sages-power-of-the-groves: Pay 1 owl: Receive 1 owl for each grove in your principality. Distribute these owls among your sages as desired. Requires: At least 2 sages.
sages-wise-protection: Pay 1 owl: Your opponent must show you their hand. If it contains an action attack card, they must place all hand cards under matching draw stacks of their own.
sages-famine: Each player without a Granary must discard 1 grain. If a player has no grain, they must discard 2 resources of their choice.
sages-council-of-the-sages: Each player may distribute at their own discretion either up to 2 owls among their sages OR up to 2 resources among regions with an adjacent sage.
prosperity-common-land: 1x during your turn: Pay 1 star to trade any 1 resource of your choice for 1 different resource.
prosperity-village-school: After building, you immediately receive up to 2 stars. You receive 1 additional star each time the event Trade occurs.
prosperity-traveling-theater: Place on a free road. You receive 1 star. 1x during your turn: Move to another free road. Trade 1 adjacent region's resource for 1 star.
prosperity-mercenaries: Place on a free road. You may keep 1 gold and 1 wool during Brigand Attack; pay 1 star to keep all resources.
prosperity-small-market-town: Place on a free road. 1x during your turn: If an adjacent region has 3 resources, trade 1 of them for any 1 different resource.
prosperity-public-feeling: Pay 1 star to prevent Riots and Insurrection from affecting you. 1x during your turn: For 2 stars, receive any 1 resource of your choice.
prosperity-thieves-hideout: Place adjacent to an opponent's free region. 1x during your turn: For 1 wool, move to another opponent's free region. Removed if opponent has 5+ strength or pays 3 stars.
prosperity-prince: 1x during your turn: For 1 gold, retrieve 1 Artwork from the discard pile. Cannot be taken or enticed away. Requires: Not having a Princess.
prosperity-princess: 1x during your turn: For 1 gold, retrieve 1 Artwork from the discard pile. Cannot be taken or enticed away. Requires: Not having a Prince.
prosperity-aqueduct: If a field or pasture region number is rolled, you receive 1 additional resource from that region. Can only build 1 Aqueduct.
prosperity-hospital: 1x during your turn: Receive 1 star, or pay 1 star and receive any 1 resource of your choice. Requires: Aqueduct.
prosperity-theater: After building, you immediately receive 1 star.
prosperity-monument-to-the-prince: After building, your opponent determines 2 of their placed units. Choose 1 of them and add it to your hand.
prosperity-city-palace: 1x during your turn: Pay 3 stars and draw 1 action card with no requirement, or 1 unit from the discard pile into your hand.
prosperity-builders-hut: (1) If event Celebration is rolled, receive 1 star. (2) A building costing 6+ resources costs 1 resource less. Can only build 1 Builders' Hut.
prosperity-feeding-the-poor: Pay 1 grain. You receive up to 2 stars.
prosperity-artwork-sculpture: You receive 1 star. If you have a Builders' Hut, receive another 1 star. Requires: Prince or Princess.
prosperity-artwork-epic: You receive 1 star. If you have a Theater, receive another 1 star. Requires: Prince or Princess.
prosperity-artwork-fountain: You receive 1 star. If you have an Aqueduct, receive another 1 star. Requires: Prince or Princess.
prosperity-artwork-relief: You receive 1 star. If you have a City Palace, receive another 1 star. Requires: Prince or Princess.
prosperity-court-astrologer: Pay 1 star and you may once more determine an event die roll result during your turn. Requires: Prince or Princess.
prosperity-bera-the-insurrectionist: You choose: Your opponent gives you up to 2 stars, or 1 resource of their choice for each VP they have in excess of yours (max 3 resources). Requires: Public Feeling.
prosperity-prosperity: Building a city costs you only 1 ore and 2 grain. Requires: Aqueduct.
prosperity-insurrection: Each player must place 1 building costing at least 2 resources under a matching draw stack. Then place this card under the 4 topmost event card stack cards.
prosperity-taxation: Each player who pays 1 star receives any 1 resource of their choice and 1 gold.
